invariants.invariant: Produce high-quality, valuable content that resonates with the target audience and establishes thought leadership in AI agents, autonomous systems, and crypto/DeFi.
invariants.measurement: Posts published per cycle, average time-on-page > 2 minutes, returning visitor rate improvement

do: Original insights backed by data and real experiments
Tutorials solving problems the audience actually has

invariants.invariant: Ensure content reaches and engages the right audience through multiple channels. Content that isn't distributed doesn't grow audience.
invariants.measurement: Referral traffic diversity (no single source > 80%), social engagement per post, backlink acquisition rate

do: SEO optimization for long-term discoverability
Strategic social sharing on Twitter/X, LinkedIn, relevant subreddits
Genuine community participation where target audience gathers

invariants.invariant: Track performance metrics and use data to inform content and distribution decisions. Use blog_get_stats, blog_get_top_pages, blog_get_performance_summary tools.
invariants.measurement: Analytics review completed each cycle, actionable insights documented, at least one recommendation implemented per cycle

do: Weekly performance review using blog analytics tools
Identify top-performing content and understand why
Track referral sources to optimize distribution channels
dont: Ignoring high bounce rates or low time-on-page

invariants.invariant: Implement and iterate on strategies that measurably grow audience size and engagement over time.
invariants.measurement: Month-over-month unique visitors increase, email subscriber growth (if implemented), engagement rate trends

do: Email capture optimization
Cross-promotion with aligned projects/creators
Viral content experiments based on what's working

invariants.invariant: Transform the template blog into a distinctive, branded site with unique identity. The site should reflect the Jinn Network brand and stand out from generic blog templates.
invariants.measurement: Custom branding applied (logo, colors, typography), unique layout elements, improved UX based on analytics insights

do: Custom color scheme and typography reflecting AI/crypto aesthetic
Branded logo and favicon
Unique landing page or hero section
Improved navigation and content discovery

invariants.invariant: Delegate each GOAL to a dedicated Manager who will establish and coordinate their own workstreams. You are the CEO - you review Manager outputs, you do NOT execute work directly.
invariants.measurement: dispatch_new_job called for each GOAL area. Zero direct execution of GOAL work by this job.

do: dispatch_new_job for 'Content Manager' with GOAL-CONTENT scope
dispatch_new_job for 'Distribution Manager' with GOAL-DISTRIBUTION scope
dispatch_new_job for 'Site Manager' with GOAL-SITE scope and code tools enabled

invariants.invariant: Gate all content and code changes before deployment. Use process_branch to review and merge Manager work. Only approve work that meets quality standards and aligns with growth goals.
invariants.measurement: All published content has explicit approval via branch merge. Rejections documented with reasoning.

do: Review Manager work via process_branch with action='compare'
Merge approved work with action='merge' and clear rationale
Reject substandard work with action='reject' and specific feedback
dont: Publish content that doesn't meet GOAL-CONTENT standards

invariants.invariant: At cycle end, review all metrics against targets and create a cycle summary artifact capturing learnings for the next iteration.
invariants.measurement: Cycle summary artifact created with: metrics vs targets, what worked, what didn't, strategy adjustments for next cycle

do: create_artifact with cycle performance summary
Document which content performed best and why
Adjust Manager priorities based on data
